title: Eddy — fluid studio
description: A real-time, from-scratch incompressible Navier–Stokes fluid studio in pure TypeScript. Stable Fluids with semi-Lagrangian + MacCormack advection, a red-black Gauss–Seidel/SOR pressure-projection Poisson solve, vorticity confinement, a Boussinesq temperature field driving real thermal convection, RGB ink, and arbitrary solid obstacles. Ten scenes — von Kármán vortex street, Rayleigh–Bénard convection, a buoyant plume, Kelvin–Helmholtz shear, and the lid-driven-cavity benchmark — plus dye/speed/vorticity/pressure/temperature views, streamline + tracer-particle overlays, WebM capture, live energy/divergence diagnostics, and a built-in numerical verification suite that checks the solver's invariants live in the browser.
